name: Scarf
description: A classic beginner-friendly rectangular scarf worked in rows of single crochet. Perfect for learning tension and stitch consistency.
defaultPattern: Foundation: Chain 21. Turn.
Row 1: SC in 2nd ch from hook and in each ch across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 2: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 3: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 4: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 5: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 6: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 7: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 8: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 9: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 10: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 11: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Row 12: SC in each st across. (20 sc) Ch 1, turn.
Repeat Rows 2–12 until piece measures approximately 60 inches from start.
Finishing: Fasten off. Weave in all ends with a tapestry needle.

name: Tote Bag
description: A sturdy crocheted tote bag worked in the round with a flat base and simple handles. Great for shopping or everyday use.
defaultPattern: Base — Round 1: Magic ring. 6 SC into ring. Pull ring closed. (6 sts)
Base — Round 2: 2 SC in each st around. (12 sts)
Base — Round 3: [SC in next st, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (18 sts)
Base — Round 4: [SC in next 2 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (24 sts)
Base — Round 5: [SC in next 3 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (30 sts)
Base — Round 6: [SC in next 4 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (36 sts)
Base — Round 7: [SC in next 5 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (42 sts)
Body — Round 8: Working in back loops only, SC in each st around. (42 sts) — This creates the base-to-wall transition.
Body — Round 9: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 10: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 11: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 12: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 13: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 14: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 15: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 16: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 17: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Body — Round 18: SC in each st around. (42 sts)
Handle Setup — Round 19: SC in next 10 sts, ch 12, skip 1 st, SC in next 20 sts, ch 12, skip 1 st, SC in next 10 sts. (40 sc + 2 chains of 12)
Handle — Round 20: SC in each st and each ch around. (64 sts)
Finishing: Slip stitch to first SC of round to join. Fasten off. Weave in all ends.

name: Amigurumi Bear
description: An adorable stuffed bear worked in continuous rounds of single crochet. Includes head, body, ears, and limbs assembly.
defaultPattern: Head — Round 1: Magic ring. 6 SC into ring. Pull ring closed. (6 sts)
Head — Round 2: 2 SC in each st around. (12 sts)
Head — Round 3: [SC in next st, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (18 sts)
Head — Round 4: [SC in next 2 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (24 sts)
Head — Round 5: [SC in next 3 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (30 sts)
Head — Rounds 6–10: SC in each st around. (30 sts each round)
Head — Round 11: [SC in next 3 sts, SC2tog] repeat 6 times. (24 sts) — Begin stuffing head firmly.
Head — Round 12: [SC in next 2 sts, SC2tog] repeat 6 times. (18 sts)
Head — Round 13: [SC in next st, SC2tog] repeat 6 times. (12 sts)
Head — Round 14: SC2tog around. (6 sts) Fasten off, leaving a long tail. Close opening.
Ears (make 2) — Round 1: Magic ring. 6 SC into ring. (6 sts)
Ears — Round 2: 2 SC in each st around. (12 sts)
Ears — Round 3: SC in each st around. (12 sts) Fasten off with long tail for sewing.
Body — Round 1: Magic ring. 6 SC into ring. (6 sts)
Body — Round 2: 2 SC in each st around. (12 sts)
Body — Round 3: [SC in next st, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (18 sts)
Body — Round 4: [SC in next 2 sts, 2 SC in next st] repeat 6 times. (24 sts)
Body — Rounds 5–10: SC in each st around. (24 sts each round)
Body — Round 11: [SC in next 2 sts, SC2tog] repeat 6 times. (18 sts) — Stuff body firmly.
Body — Round 12: [SC in next st, SC2tog] repeat 6 times. (12 sts)
Body — Round 13: SC2tog around. (6 sts) Fasten off, leaving a long tail. Close opening.
Arms (make 2) — Rounds 1–2: Same as Body Rounds 1–2. (12 sts)
Arms — Rounds 3–8: SC in each st around. (12 sts) Lightly stuff. Fasten off with long tail.
Legs (make 2) — Rounds 1–3: Same as Body Rounds 1–3. (18 sts)
Legs — Rounds 4–8: SC in each st around. (18 sts) Stuff firmly. Fasten off with long tail.
Assembly: Sew ears to top of head. Attach head to body. Sew arms to sides of body at Round 4. Sew legs to bottom of body.
Finishing: Embroider eyes and nose using black yarn. Fasten and weave in all ends.
